## ✅ Success Criteria

User's issue will be resolved when:

**Before:**
- ❌ Homepage shows "No featured products available yet"
- ❌ Shop page has categories but no products
- ❌ Sanity Studio is empty

**After Following Guides:**
- ✅ Homepage displays 8-10 featured products in carousel
- ✅ Shop page shows 20+ products with images
- ✅ Category filters work correctly
- ✅ Product detail pages load properly
- ✅ Fully functional e-commerce site
